title: Spathacanthus simplicifolius
taxonomy: Spathacanthus simplicifolius is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Spathacanthus and is native to the Americas. It is often classified as a shrub or a small tree due to its growth habit. The classification of Spathacanthus simplicifolius is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, the clade Angiosperms, and the order Lamiales.
